title: automation-migration-router inputs
description: Typed inputs for the automation-migration-router runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

object_name.description: Example from AGENT.md: `Opportunity` Required column: 'yes for `wf_rule` / `process_builder` / `auto`; optional for `approval_process` (org-wide sweep if omitted)'.

mode.description: Example from AGENT.md: `analyze` (default — inventory + gate verdicts only) | `plan` (analyze + target design) | `migrate` (plan + parallel-run dates + rollback) Required column: 'no'.

consolidation_mode.description: Example from AGENT.md: `aggressive` | `conservative` | `auto` (default) — see `phase_gates.md` Required column: 'no'.

include_inactive.description: Example from AGENT.md: default `false` — inactive artifacts are cataloged, not migrated Required column: 'no'.

canary_percent.description: Example from AGENT.md: `approval_process` only; default `10` — percentage of submissions routed to the new Orchestration during the canary window Required column: 'no'.

parallel_run_days.description: Example from AGENT.md: default `7` for field-updating sources; default `14` for `approval_process` Required column: 'no'.
